home.heroDescription: Enterprise platforms. Small business websites. AI that actually saves you time. One developer, a decade of experience, and every detail handled.
home.enterpriseDescription: I join engineering teams as a senior frontend developer to design systems, lead React and Next.js development, and ship production code faster with AI. Complex platforms, delivered simply.
home.smallBusinessDescription: You keep hearing about AI but don't know where to start. That's where I come in. I'll figure out where AI can actually save you time and money, build the systems to make it happen, and handle your web presence while I'm at it. Custom websites, responsive design, workflow automation, done right and done fast so you can focus on running your business.
home.aiSectionTitle: You know AI is changing everything. You just don't know where to start.
home.aiSectionDescription: Most business owners hear about AI every day but have no idea how it applies to what they do. That's exactly what I help with. I look at how your business actually runs, find the spots where AI can save you real time and money, and build the systems to make it happen.
home.aiExample1Description: Social media posts, email newsletters, blog drafts, and product descriptions, generated from a single prompt, in your brand voice.
home.aiExample2Description: Automatic follow-ups when someone fills out a form, smart lead scoring, and CRM updates that happen without you touching a thing.
home.aiExample3Description: AI chatbots that answer questions, book appointments, and handle FAQs 24/7 so you don't have to.
home.aiExample4Description: Invoice processing, appointment scheduling, data entry, file organization. The stuff that eats your day, handled automatically.
home.aiCta: Book a strategy session and I'll show you exactly what AI can do for your business.
home.quote: I've built platforms for banks, telecom giants, and Fortune 500 teams. Then I'd go home and build a website for a mom starting a business at her kitchen table. Turns out both need the same thing: someone who takes the work personally.
home.ctaDescription: Enterprise platform, small business website, or figuring out how AI fits into what you do. Let's talk.

services.enterpriseDescription: I join your team as a senior frontend developer and solution architect, designing systems, leading React and Next.js development, and using AI to accelerate delivery. The kind of thinking that comes from years inside large-scale engineering teams.
services.solutionArchDesc: System design, technical strategy, and web application architecture aligned with business goals.
services.frontendLeadDesc: Leading teams, setting standards, driving technical decisions.
services.aiDevDesc: Shipping production code faster without cutting corners.
services.platformDesc: Headless CMS architecture, multi-language platforms, ecommerce development, and cloud deployment.
services.enterpriseScoped: Enterprise engagements are scoped per project.
services.smallBusinessTitle: One less thing on your plate.
services.strategyDescription: Not sure how AI fits into your business? This is where we figure it out. A focused deep-dive into your technology, workflows, and the opportunities you're probably missing. You walk away with a clear, prioritized action plan.
services.websiteDescription: A modern, responsive website built with AI. SEO-friendly, designed to convert, and delivered in weeks not months.
services.automationDescription: You're doing things manually that AI could handle in seconds. I'll find those gaps, build the automations, and give you back hours every week.
services.automationFeature1: Full workflow audit to find every time sink
services.automationFeature2: Custom AI automations built for your business
services.automationFeature3: Integration with your existing tools and platforms
services.automationFeature4: Training so your team can manage it going forward
services.retainerDescription: Ongoing support, maintenance, and optimization. Your technology partner on call.
services.faq1Q: How much does a custom website cost?
services.faq1A: Small business websites typically range from $3,000 to $10,000 depending on the number of pages, custom functionality, and whether you need ecommerce, a content management system, or integrations with other tools. Enterprise engagements are scoped individually based on team size, timeline, and technical complexity. The best way to get an accurate number is to book a strategy session. I'll assess what you actually need and give you a clear quote with no surprises.
services.faq2Q: How long does it take to build a website?
services.faq2A: It depends on the project. A straightforward small business website typically takes 4 to 8 weeks from kickoff to launch. That includes custom design, development, content setup, mobile optimization, and basic SEO. More complex projects like ecommerce sites, platforms with custom integrations, or website redesigns with content migration can take 8 to 12 weeks. Enterprise projects vary based on scope and team structure. I use AI to compress timelines without sacrificing quality, and you'll always have a clear timeline before we start.
services.faq3Q: What is AI automation for small business?
services.faq3A: AI automation replaces repetitive manual tasks with intelligent systems that run on their own. For small businesses, that could mean automatic email follow-ups when someone fills out a form, AI-generated social media content from a single prompt, smart scheduling that eliminates back-and-forth, automated bookkeeping and invoice processing, or chatbots that handle customer questions 24/7. The goal isn't to replace you. It's to give you back hours every week so you can focus on the parts of your business that actually need you.
services.faq4Q: Do I need a website redesign?
services.faq4A: If your site is slow, not mobile-friendly, hard to update, or just isn't converting visitors into customers, it's probably time. Other signs: you're embarrassed to send people to it, it doesn't show up on Google, or you can't make simple changes without calling your developer. A modern, responsive website redesign isn't just a visual refresh. It's faster load times, better SEO, a mobile-first experience, and a site you actually own and can update yourself.
services.faq5Q: How can AI help my business?
services.faq5A: More than you probably realize. Most business owners spend hours on tasks that AI can handle in minutes: writing emails, creating social posts, organizing files, following up with leads, updating spreadsheets. In a strategy session, I audit your entire workflow and show you exactly where AI fits in. Then I build the systems so it actually happens. Past clients have saved 10+ hours a week after automating just two or three processes.
services.faq6Q: What's the difference between a freelance web developer and an agency?
services.faq6A: With an agency, you talk to an account manager who talks to a project manager who talks to the developer. With me, you talk to the person building your site. That means faster turnarounds, no miscommunication, and no overhead costs getting passed to you. I bring over a decade of experience at companies like Bell Canada and Wells Fargo, the same caliber of work you'd get from a top agency, without the layers and the price tag.
services.notSureDescription: Most business owners know AI could help but don't know how. Book a strategy session and I'll show you exactly where to start.

work.smallBusinessDescription: 8 years of web development services for small business owners. Custom websites, website redesigns, and community platforms, built by a freelance web developer who actually understands what you're trying to do.
work.bellDescription: Architecting a bilingual corporate communications platform for one of Canada's largest telecommunications companies. Next.js, headless CMS, and AWS at enterprise scale.
work.wellsDescription: Led frontend development across multiple projects at one of the world's largest financial institutions. Built reusable, data-driven component systems. Went from contractor to tech lead within the year.
work.sofarDescription: Built the ecommerce and event management platforms for a global live music community. Ticket purchasing, artist management, venue coordination, the full stack.
work.tauliaDescription: Full-stack development on supply chain finance software. Standalone React applications, agile teams, and the kind of fintech complexity that teaches you to build things right.
work.miscarriageMovement: A digital home for a community supporting those who've experienced pregnancy loss. Website and community platform built for connection.
work.motherChapter: Helping moms navigate postpartum identity. A community platform designed with care, built for growth.
work.chrisRyan: A conversion-focused small business website for a fitness coaching business. SEO-friendly design with a clear path to booking.
work.notion: Custom website development for a consulting firm. Clean, professional, responsive design built to establish credibility and generate leads.
work.charell: Custom website for a creative professional. Personal brand, brought to life online.
work.steveChiger: Professional website with ongoing monthly support. Long-term partnership, continuously maintained.
work.designBureaux: Elegant web presence for an interior design studio. Minimal aesthetic, maximum impact.
work.lindsayTigar: Portfolio and blog platform for a freelance writer and content creator. Clean design built for storytelling.
work.laRuePR: Complete website redesign and rebuild for a bold PR agency. Custom responsive design, new platform, full ownership back in the client's hands.
work.transactis: Corporate website for a fintech company specializing in electronic billing solutions.
work.testimonialLindsay: As someone who is easily intimidated by anything-and-everything pertaining to web development, working with Jessica was like a sigh of relief. She took my ideas and easily brought them to life, taking my once dull portfolio site and turning it into an impressive body of work that I love sharing far and wide. I totally recommend her creativity, hard work and positive attitude to any fellow badass female who wants to finally get their website finished!
work.testimonialEmilia: Jessica really listened to what I needed and wanted. She brought with her deep expertise, creativity, and the willingness to try new things. She remained ever professional and quick to respond to any concern I might have. I would highly recommend working with Jessica.
work.testimonialSusan: My site, especially the fantastic coverage I'd received, was a mish mash mess before Jess came through with an amazing re-design. I am so comfortable now with the site overall and happily flaunt it with confidence.
work.testimonialLori: My blog was in dire need of a redo but I kept putting it off until I found Jessica. With her, the process of making a more modern site was seamless. She is kind, helpful, available, reliable, and has a great sense of style. I am recommending her to my closest friends and colleagues.

about.bio1: I've spent over a decade as a frontend developer and solution architect. Starting in fintech, moving through a global music platform, leading frontend teams at Wells Fargo, and now architecting enterprise platforms for Bell Canada.
about.bio2: Along the way, I spent eight years as a freelance web developer, helping entrepreneurs and small business owners (public relations agencies, authors, bakers, influencers, journalists, mothers) bring their ideas online with custom website design and development. I've mentored developers, led engineering teams, and learned that the best technology is the kind that disappears into the background and just works.
about.bio3: Tatham Tech is where all of that comes together. Enterprise solution architecture. Small business web development. AI-powered everything.
about.bio4: Before tech, I was in animal science. Not the obvious career path, but diagnosing problems under pressure turns out to be a transferable skill.
about.shipDescription: I use AI at every stage, from generating initial designs to writing code to automating testing. What used to take months now takes weeks. You get the same quality in less time, and you stay in the loop the entire way.
about.clarityTitle: You'll always know where things stand
about.clarityDescription: No disappearing for weeks. No jargon-filled updates. I keep it simple, I keep it honest, and I make sure you understand every decision before we move forward.
about.bothSidesDescription: I've been the engineer in the room at massive companies, and the freelancer helping a first-time founder get their site off the ground. I bring the same care to both.
about.wantToWorkDescription: Whether you need a senior architect on your team, a new website, or someone to show you how AI can actually help your business.

contact.thankYouDescription: I'll be in touch within 1 to 2 business days.
